entries.target: Importálás CSV or JSON csomag with real tests. The selected variant is then shown to jelölts.

entries.source: CSV columns: variantCode, level, language, questionId, type, points, text, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, correctAnswer. JSON format: { "variants": [...], "questions": { "VARIANT_CODE": [...] } }.

entries.target: Structured source of four vizsgaination documents. Kérdéss, szakaszs, scoring and vizsgainer guidance are edited here and mentésd as the final vizsgaination csomag.

entries.target: These tools are mainly for migration, backups and technical checks. For routine vizsga preparation, use the main buttons above.

entries.target: Edit the preface, jelölt introduction, szakaszs and kérdéss. This structure is the source for the JSON csomag and print/PDF.

entries.target: Szakaszs are created from the Szakasz field in individual kérdéss.

Examiner help / correct answer / scoring guidance

entries.target: The Centre Audit Csomag requires a valid Centre session. Remegnyitás the Centre QR and try again.

entries.target: Translation management applies only to the application interface. Vizsga content comes from the Admin csomag and must not be changed by UX nyelv.

entries.target: Every interface term is stored here with its key, English source, aktuális UI translation and conszöveg for Admin review.

entries.target: Generate the centre link only when the csomag is kész and the vizsga is megnyitás.
